text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been asked to help with a mini<n>concert the
academy is putting on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Four Umamusume will be performing.<n>The concert
won't be for a while, but<n>the promo posters have
already<n>arrived.
choice_data_list: Time to put these all up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!
choice_data_list: Hey. You're hard at work, as always.
Hey. You're hard at work, as always.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hello again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Thanks again for helping me tutor my<n>classmates.
choice_data_list: Of course. Don't mention it.
Of course. Don't mention it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Remembering back, she was<n>practicing her
dancing before her<n>classmate called us away. And
now<n>that I think of it...
choice_data_list:
I'm guessing you're going to be in the concert,
huh?

I'm guessing you're going to be in the concert,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That poster... Wow, they've arrived<n>already?
That's fast. But yeah, I am!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't Opera O look fantastic on<n>that poster?
And so do Doto and<n>Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me—I heard a trainer's<n>been
assigned to the event as<n>support staff.
choice_data_list: Yep. That would be me.
Yep. That would be me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence! Well, here's to<n>working
together again!
choice_data_list: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe she started<n>practicing for the
concert so far in<n>advance. She's the epitome of
dedicated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, while I'm checking the<n>trainer
version of the school's event<n>schedule...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Do you have a moment,<n>Trainer?
choice_data_list: Of course. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, were you checking the school<n>schedule?
Perfect timing, then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There have been some changes to<n>the participants
listed for the next<n>scrimmage. Here's the new list.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look and notice Narita Top<n>Road has been
added to it.
choice_data_list: Top Road is participating in it too?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We were worried that we<n>wouldn't find a sub
in time, but she<n>volunteered to fill the vacant slot.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's got her whole class excited.<n>She's quite the
popular class rep, you<n>know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's doing this on top of the<n>upcoming concert?
I'm worried she<n>might be overstretching herself,
so I<n>go to check in the training center,<n>and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Phew!
choice_data_list:
I had a bad feeling you'd be here... It's getting
pretty late.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming to check on me! I<n>guess I
must've worried you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But if you're scared I'm overworking<n>myself, I'm
not. I'm keeping a close<n>eye on how much I'm
training just to<n>be sure.
choice_data_list: Still...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Can I show you my dance<n>for the
concert, please?
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can answer, she starts<n>dancing.
Compared to the last time I<n>saw her...
choice_data_list: Incredible! Your dance is perfect!
Incredible! Your dance is perfect!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Well? Does that ease<n>your worries a
little?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I started practicing my dance ages<n>ago and
polished it up little by little.<n>I've already nailed it
down<n>completely.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been devoting more<n>time to my
running than dancing<n>lately!
choice_data_list: Honestly, you're incredible!
Honestly, you're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's brushing it off like it's nothing,<n>but it's clear
how much effort she's<n>putting in daily to meet
everyone's<n>expectations.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see you in the scrimmage!
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's brushing it off like it's nothing,<n>but it's clear
how much effort she's<n>putting in daily to meet
everyone's<n>expectations.
choice_data_list: I can't wait to see you in the scrimmage!
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.
Still, be careful not to overtax yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'll do even more training to<n>make sure I
don't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me one last bright smile<n>before
returning to the field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, on the day of the scrimmage,<n>Narita Top
Road does spectacularly!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I will. I was just thinking of<n>calling it a day
soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I have an idea! Why don't you join<n>me for some
cool-down stretches?<n>You must be feeling stiff
from all your<n>desk work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, on the day of the scrimmage,<n>Narita Top
Road does spectacularly!
